61ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539439423599954968","book_info":{"abstract":"（不恋爱，军旅，特种兵，热血，搞笑）
王阳意外穿越，成了一名刚毕业的军官。
被范天坑安排训练火凤凰。
既然如此，谁也别想从我这儿走后门！
想坑我？
可我体能第一，射击第一，战术还是第一。
红细胞？
被姑娘们轻松拿捏，狠狠打脸！
姑娘们以为这就是特种兵生活时，王阳却突然把他们拉上了战场。
血雨腥风，枪林弹雨！
原来这个世界并不和平，只不过有一群人在默默守护。
手持利剑，低头弯腰，隐姓埋名，负重前行！
他们的名字无人知晓！
他们的功绩与世长存！
多年后。
王阳肩挂麦穗，在一望无际的大海上，大手一挥，“前进！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d744bc615a286a5baeed11d0324732d","author":"字节一跳","author_id":"","book_id":"7539439423599954968","book_name":"我一毕业军官，让我接手火凤凰？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#284058","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7539439498560553496","read_count":"12716","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"441553"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"212","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,特种兵,打脸,搞笑轻松,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4dba1d787c89b54d35d6816d6d723d95~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779174855&x-signature=okqFL5GXa1h6wWCQEkhVEihj9JQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2454569320194163","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"30"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032015141583F3C4F222F640DAD347"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwar
